title: My Team Needs Help Setting up a Real Estate specific CRM
excerpt: Hey, there! Myself & my team are making a CRM switch from Hubspot to Monday.com. We are having troubles finding the right automations, integrations, & usage of boards. We need an expert to help walk us through, hold our …

posts.author: johnpavlansky (John Pavlansky)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey, there! Myself & my team are making a CRM switch from Hubspot to Monday.com. We are having troubles finding the right automations, integrations, & usage of boards. We need an expert to help walk us through, hold our hand, & help us create an amazing system for our business. We are unable to put a ton of personal time towards this with the amount of volume we do in the real estate business, we are quick learners but need a push in the right direction. We already have a list of what we would like to accomplish with this new CRM & are ready to get started with a consulting expert!

posts.author: andres-at-connex (Andrés at Connex)
posts.cookedHtml:
@johnpavlansky, we can help. Let’s meet on Zoom to go over the details. Book a time of us here https://connex.digital/book/monday

Talk soon!

posts.author: Carson (Carson Butcher)
posts.cookedHtml: If you’re looking for experts to hold your hand through this change, check out our monday CRM Onboarding!

posts.author: amber-upstream (Amber Heaford)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @johnpavlansky Amber from upstream here. We’re certified monday.com platinum partners as well as HubSpot Diamond partners and have years of experience across both platforms. I’d be more than happy to tee up a time to chat about getting you migrated from HubSpot and onboarded on monday.com. You can book in a quick chat with me here to talk through your requirements.

Cheers

posts.author: kindertech (KinderTech)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there John. Nathan here with Kinder Tech. We specialize in Monday.com and automation development. If you’d like to check us out and maybe set up a call please see our website. https://www.kinder-technologies.com/

All the best,
Nathan Kind
Lead Consultant | Kinder Tech

posts.author: Hezibo (Hezi Bosmi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @johnpavlansky
I hear you
Onboarding to mondayCRM can be overwhelming

As a certified by monday.com, I implemented the CRM in more than 50 businesses
I’ve been working with multiple real estate agencies in the USA
I’d love to chat and work together
hezi@kindaa.io
Let’s meet

posts.author: KayaW (Kaya Wong)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @johnpavlansky. Kaya here from Kick Consulting.
We are an Australian based monday.com business, monday.com experts and a Silver Partner, and I would like to invite you to have a chat about your needs and how we support your monday.com optimisation.
You can book here for a complimentary discovery call to see if we align.

Hope to see you soon!
